missions.title: Skate Bowl Pose
missions.task: Find the concrete skate bowls at Rabalder Park. Your entire team must strike a synchronized skater pose on the edge of a ramp. Action shot required - everyone off the ground? Legendary bonus.
missions.scan_hint: Check under the lip of the big concrete bowl
missions.next_hint: Run to the old concrete factory walls. Look low near the colorful mural corner.
missions.hint: The big bowl is the deepest one, closest to the fence. The QR is tucked into the seam where the concrete lip meets the metal coping.

missions.title: Factory Face-Off
missions.task: Race to the old concrete walls. Find the wildest piece of graffiti or mural. Recreate it with your bodies - same poses, same expressions. Take a side-by-side photo.
missions.scan_hint: Low on the wall near the colorful mural corner
missions.next_hint: Head to Skrammellegepladsen. Look inside a tire near the back fence.
missions.hint: Face the big psychedelic owl mural. Walk 3 meters left. The QR is at shin height on the concrete pillar.

missions.title: Skrammel Challenge
missions.task: The junk playground! Build something that represents Klaudusia using ONLY found materials here - tires, wood, pipes, ropes. Spell her name, make a crown, build a throne. Photo of your creation required.
missions.scan_hint: Inside a tire near the back fence
missions.next_hint: Sprint to the Ragnarock museum entrance. Check behind the right-side pillar.
missions.hint: The big tractor tire against the chain-link fence. Look inside it, QR is taped to the inner wall on the fence side.

missions.title: Rock Star Moment
missions.task: Your team is headlining Ragnarock TONIGHT. Pose as a legendary rock band on the museum steps. Someone must be the lead singer (mic pose), someone on air guitar, someone on drums. No actual instruments - pure air performance.
missions.scan_hint: Behind the right-side pillar at the museum entrance
missions.next_hint: Find the mini Orange Stage. Check under the stage edge, stage right.
missions.hint: Standing at the main entrance, the right-side concrete pillar. Go around to the back side - QR at chest height facing the building wall.

missions.title: The Orange Stage
missions.location: Orange Stage replica / open stage area
missions.task: Find the mini Orange Stage. Your team must perform a 30-second Happy Birthday in the most dramatic way possible. Opera? Death metal? Whisper-rap? The stage is yours. Film it.
missions.scan_hint: Under the stage edge, stage right
missions.next_hint: Go to the art installations area. Find the tallest sculpture near Hal 12. Check at its base.
missions.hint: Facing the stage from audience: go to right-hand edge, crouch down. QR stuck to underside of stage about 30cm in from edge.

missions.title: Creature of Musicon
missions.task: Find any sculpture, art piece, or weird object. Your team must become a 5-headed creature with it - everyone physically connected (arms linked, stacked, hugging). The weirder the creature, the better. Photo required.
missions.scan_hint: At the base of the tallest sculpture near Hal 12
missions.next_hint: Race to the central square. Check behind the community notice board.
missions.hint: The tall rusted-metal figure - not the short stone ones. Walk around clockwise. QR stuck to back of left concrete footing at ankle height.

missions.title: Time Capsule
missions.task: As a team, record a 20-second video message to Klaudusia from the future - 10 years from now. What do you hope she remembers about today? What do you wish for her? Be sincere, be funny, be you.
missions.scan_hint: Tucked behind the community notice board in the square
missions.next_hint: Head to the green area with rain gardens. Find the largest planter box.
missions.hint: The wooden notice board near the bike racks. Reach behind the right edge - QR taped flat against the back panel.

missions.title: The Green Labyrinth
missions.task: Find the planted rain gardens and winding paths. Your team must navigate the paths blindfolded - one person guides, the rest follow with eyes closed. Record a 15-second video. The guide must use only absurd directions ('two penguin steps left, now waddle forward').
missions.scan_hint: Under the largest planter box in the rain garden
missions.next_hint: Go to the tunnel under the railway. Look for the QR at the midpoint bend.
missions.hint: The long rectangular planter with tall grasses. Lie on your back, look up at underside of wooden rim. QR on inner lip, about a meter from left end.

missions.title: Tunnel Symphony
missions.task: Find the long tunnel under the tracks. Your team must create a spontaneous song about Klaudusia using the tunnel's natural echo. Clap, stomp, sing, beatbox - use the acoustics. Record 20 seconds. Bonus if strangers join in.
missions.scan_hint: In the middle of the tunnel, on the wall at the bend
missions.next_hint: Final stop! Go to the gathering spot. Find the QR near the cake table.
missions.hint: Walk to the midpoint where the tunnel curves. QR on left wall (walking toward green area), tucked into recess between two concrete panels at chest height.

missions.title: The Birthday Offering
missions.task: Using ONLY found natural objects (sticks, stones, fallen leaves - nothing bought, nothing picked from live plants), create a gift for Klaudusia. Spell her name. Build a crown. Make a portrait. Then find the Gamemaster to present it! This is your final mission.
missions.scan_hint: Hidden at the final gathering spot - near the cake
missions.next_hint: Congratulations! Race back to the admin to check the final leaderboard!
missions.hint: Look under the table or bench where the cake is set up. QR is on the UNDERSIDE of the seating surface - you have to feel for it.
